useCase.name: Health access and medicine accountability
useCase.problem: Patients, facilities, supply chains, insurance schemes, and reporting systems often hold partial records that do not connect safely.
useCase.outcome: A patient or facility can be identified, services and medicines can be tracked, and public health data can be produced with privacy protected.

summary: Zambia: A patient or facility can be identified, services and medicines can be tracked, and public health data can be produced with privacy protected.
